code: import{AnimatePresence,motion}from'framer-motion';import{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const slides=[{id:1,title:'Daily Dispatch Efficiency',text:'Track pick-up success and order volume.'},{id:2,title:'Carrier Performance',text:'Monitor DHL/UPS/DPD rapidly.'},{id:3,title:'Urgency Distribution',text:'See how many priority orders are pending.'}];function Carousel(_ref){let{logs}=_ref;const[index,setIndex]=useState(0);useEffect(()=>{const timer=setInterval(()=>setIndex(prev=>(prev+1)%slides.length),3500);return()=>clearInterval(timer);},[]);const slide=slides[index];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"panel",style:{marginBottom:'16px'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Daily Highlights"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AnimatePresence,{mode:"wait",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(motion.div,{initial:{opacity:0,x:16},animate:{opacity:1,x:0},exit:{opacity:0,x:-16},transition:{duration:0.45},style:{padding:'12px',background:'#f8fafc',borderRadius:'10px',marginTop:'8px'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:slide.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:slide.text}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{style:{color:'#6b7280',fontSize:'0.95rem'},children:[logs.length," live events"]})]},slide.id)})]});}export default Carousel;
